title: Iakob #2384
definition:
Jacob = "heel-catcher or supplanter"

 1) was the second son of Isaac
 2) the father of Joseph, the husband of Mary
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jacob = "heel-catcher or supplanter"

 1) was the second son of Isaac
 2) the father of Joseph, the husband of Mary

    NASB:  Jacob, the son of Isaac, also the father of Joseph, Marys husband:
